source.detail: The phono3py 4.4.0 adapter conformance run from the mapengine adapters wave-1 build (dvnclabs/mapengine, tag adapters-v0.2.0): silicon thermal conductivity from the vendored Si.tersoff potential (sha256 52a93e90596829c57d54eef091de6215f1fac7ca15d57eac7568ddfdda26adfb), with every knob pinned in lineage.conditions (temperature_K, mesh, supercell_fc2, supercell_fc3, lattice_constant_angstrom, displacement_distance_angstrom, potential_name, code, code_version, bte_solver); the expected value is the run's own produced kappa, computed fresh, never invented.
